title: Rolls-Royce Plans £1.5 Billion Stock Buyback, Sky News Says
description: Rolls-Royce Holdings PLC is set to announce a share buyback worth as much as £1.5 billion ($2 billion), Sky News reported.
content: Rolls-Royce Holdings PLC is set to announce a share buyback worth as much as £1.5 billion ($2 billion), Sky News reported.
